text:
Created attachment 160391
cups-filters-1.0.73.patch

Update to 1.0.73. The poppler patch was removed as it was part of the (unreleased) 1.0.72. It also needs to use gmake or the build fails. I have allowed it to be JOBS safe, but I am not 100% sure if my poudriere test was done properly to make sure it really is JOBS safe.

Poudriere log in the next reply.
